title: Hydrochloric Acid-Potassium Chloride Buffer (HCl-KCl)
author: Neilier Junior

steps_raw.instruction: pH Range: pH 1 to pH 2.2 (a) 0.1 M Potassium chloride: 7.45 g L -1 (M.W.: 74.5 g mol -1 ) (b) 0.1 M Hydrochloric acid Mix 50 mL, potassium chloride and indicted volume of hydrochloric acid.
Mix and adjust the final volume to 100 mL with deionized water.
Adjust the final pH using a sensitive pH meter.
